author: anon-a7c6025f
content: After fixing small matmul infinite recursion bug and enabling for decode-step Linear layers: 52s for 50 tokens (1.04s/tok decode). The 1,417 cuModuleLoadData calls are all from the PREFILL phase (cuBLAS JIT for large matrices) — they're a one-time startup cost, not per-token. The per-token decode is 1.0s. Remaining per-token breakdown: ~100 kernel launches for GPU ops + GPU memory alloc/free + some remaining CPU transfers. The path to faster decode: (1) fused flash attention to cut attention from 6 kernels to 1, (2) GPU memory pool to eliminate cudaMalloc/Free, (3) pre-cached position embeddings.
